files.patch:
@@ -40,3 +40,13 @@
 - Formalized the Application Support path helpers and persistence contracts for debug logs and transcription-lab artifacts, including bounded atomic debug-log writes and invalid UUID filtering for persisted stage timings.
 - Locked the shell metadata and persistence invariants down with coverage for menu-bar bundle values, Application Support layout, debug-log schema, and the updated settings and transcription-lab persistence behavior.
 **Summary:** Delivered the persistence-contract layer behind the app shell. Ghost Pepper now writes the documented first-run defaults back into `UserDefaults`, preserves cleanup and draft preferences as typed values, persists bounded debug-log entries with stable UUIDs, and enforces the expected Application Support layout for debug logs and transcription-lab artifacts. During wrap-up, stories that still depend on later subsystems were moved instead of being marked done prematurely: STORY-0513, STORY-0514, STORY-0526, and STORY-0529 to ITER-0004, STORY-0506 and STORY-0528 to ITER-0005, STORY-0509 and STORY-0537 to ITER-0009, STORY-0494 to ITER-0010, STORY-0512 and STORY-0532 to ITER-0011, STORY-0533 to ITER-0016, STORY-0503 to ITER-0017, and STORY-0536 to ITER-0019.
+
+## ITER-0004
+
+**Completed:** 2026-04-09
+**Stories delivered:** STORY-0513, STORY-0514, STORY-0526, STORY-0529, STORY-0599, STORY-0628, STORY-0629, STORY-0630, STORY-0631, STORY-0632, STORY-0633, STORY-0634, STORY-0635, STORY-0636, STORY-0637, STORY-0638, STORY-0639, STORY-0640, STORY-0641, STORY-0642, STORY-0643, STORY-0644, STORY-0645, STORY-0647, STORY-0649, STORY-0650, STORY-0654, STORY-0655, STORY-0656, STORY-0657, STORY-0658, STORY-0659, STORY-0663
+**Tasks executed:**
+- Expanded the speech model catalog to the four documented entries and wired WhisperKit plus FluidAudio through a shared composite loader with backend-specific cache placement, download progress, and runtime initialization.
+- Hardened the model manager state machine with configured-model resolution, timeout retry handling, cached-model inventory reporting, model-load attempt logging, and a reset seam for future diarization support when switching models.
+- Added application-level speech-model recovery so a failed model bootstrap can transition from Error back to Ready after a later successful load, while keeping the hotkey monitor and status lifecycle aligned with the documented contract.
+**Summary:** Delivered the full speech-model-management layer behind Ghost Pepper’s dictation loop. The app now supports the three documented Whisper models plus the FluidAudio Parakeet backend, keeps Whisper caches under Application Support while leaving FluidAudio in its framework-managed cache, retries timed-out speech downloads and loads once after 500 ms, exposes cached-model inventory for future UI surfaces, and recovers from model-load errors back to Ready after a successful reload. During wrap-up, STORY-0660, STORY-0661, and STORY-0662 moved to ITER-0007 because they depend on the real Settings shell and Models section host surface rather than the backend model subsystem itself.
